name: Expansion Spawn Selection
description: Custom spawn location selection UI with configurable starting gear and outfit randomization.
overview:
Expansion Spawn Selection replaces the vanilla spawn system with a configurable spawn location picker. Players see a map interface where they can choose their preferred spawn point.

## Key Features

- **Spawn Location UI** — Players choose from configured spawn points on a visual map
- **Custom Starting Gear** — Define clothing and inventory items per spawn or globally
- **Outfit Randomization** — Configure multiple outfit options that are randomly selected
- **Per-Slot Clothing** — Configure headgear, glasses, masks, tops, vests, gloves, pants, belts, shoes, armbands, and backpacks
- **Random Health** — Option to spawn clothing in random or pristine condition

Settings are found in `mpmissions/dayzOffline.<mapname>/expansion/settings/SpawnSettings.json`.
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionSpawnSelection to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate SpawnSettings.json in your mission settings folder.
Configure spawn locations and starting gear.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure the mod is loaded correctly and SpawnSettings.json has valid spawn locations defined.
Verify EnableCustomClothing is set to 1 and clothing classnames are valid DayZ item names.
Check SpawnLocations coordinates are valid for your map. Invalid positions fall back to vanilla spawns.

useCases.title: Themed Spawns
useCases.description: Create themed spawn locations with matching gear — military outpost spawns with military gear, civilian town spawns with civilian clothes.

useCases.title: Balanced Starts
useCases.description: Give all players the same starting gear regardless of spawn location for balanced gameplay.

quickSettings.name: EnableCustomClothing
quickSettings.description: Use custom clothing configuration instead of vanilla default spawning gear.

quickSettings.name: SetRandomHealth
quickSettings.description: Spawn clothing in random condition instead of pristine.

steps: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @ExpansionSpawnSelection to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate SpawnSettings.json in your mission settings folder.
Configure spawn locations and starting gear.

useCases.title: Spawn selection UI not appearing
useCases.description: Ensure the mod is loaded correctly and SpawnSettings.json has valid spawn locations defined.

useCases.title: Custom clothing not applying
useCases.description: Verify EnableCustomClothing is set to 1 and clothing classnames are valid DayZ item names.

useCases.title: Players spawning at wrong positions
useCases.description: Check SpawnLocations coordinates are valid for your map. Invalid positions fall back to vanilla spawns.
